content:
Suggestions & Clarifiers:
1. Add new realms?
You might eventually want zones for:

• Dreams & unconscious logic (symbolic dreamwork system)
• The Body (movement, sensory studies, embodiment)
• AI x Ritual (machine logic into sacred/cultural practices)
• Political/Mythic Analysis (real-world systems via mythic lens)
• Archive-as-Game (interactive lorebooks, educational ARGs)

2. Workflow Clarifier:
Everything feeds everything. A sound from ETCETER4 might show up in GR1ND3R. A myth from MET4 might shape a Q_v33R podcast. All elements can be:

• Sampled
• Translated
• Remixed
• Packaged (as tools or studies)
• Documented (for others and yourself)

3. Why it Matters:
